action.reasoning: Observation: Ridge regression solved closed-form, val_mse 1.566 (similar to NLinear 1.59). Ridge weights saved. Best so far is iter-4 MSE 0.4867. Analysis: Submit ridge eval to see test score. Closed-form ridge is deterministic and might be more stable than SGD-trained NLinear. Decision: Submit eval with ridge_W.npy.
